name: AfdxSetTokenData
title: AfdxSetTokenData
syntax: long AfdxSetTokenData( long packet, char protocolDesignator[], char tokenDesignator[], long offset, long length, byte buffer[] ); // form 1
long AfdxSetTokenData( long packet, char protocolDesignator[], char tokenDesignator[], long offset, long length, char buffer[] ); // form 2
long AfdxSetTokenData( long packet, char protocolDesignator[], char tokenDesignator[], long offset, long length, struct * buffer ); // form 3
description: This function copies a number of bytes from source buffer to a token's data area. The token is not resized. Use AfdxResizeToken to change the token's length.

parameters.name: packet
parameters.description: Handle of the message that has been created with AfdxInitPacket.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: This is the offset from the beginning of the token's data area. If this is 0, data is copied starting at byte 0 of the token's data area.

parameters.name: length
parameters.description: This is the number of bytes to be copied from the specified buffer to the token's data area. Note that the token is not resized. Make sure that the token's size is at least length bytes.

parameters.name: buffer
parameters.description: This is the source buffer for the copied data.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
